cards.name: 开始守夜
cards.body: 我也懒得再折腾了。把门窗检查一遍，就这样进今晚吧。
cards.body_en: I'm too tired to fuss. One last check on the doors and windows, then we take tonight as it comes.

cards.name: 加固正门
cards.body: 正门在夜风里吱呀了一整晚。这块木板我多盯一眼吧。破门之前多争几秒，Nora 也好喘口气。
cards.body_en: That front door has been groaning all night. One more plank here buys us a few extra seconds before it gives. Nora can use the breath.

cards.name: 补窗板
cards.body: 两边的窗板都薄了，今晚让它们再硬一点。Nora 一旦上手也会快些。
cards.body_en: Both window boards are getting thin. A little extra bracing tonight, and Nora will move faster once she starts patching.

cards.name: 接备用电瓶
cards.body: 发电机断电一次就够我手忙脚乱的。先把备用电瓶接上，宁可它今天用不上。
cards.body_en: One full blackout is enough to scramble me for an hour. Hook up the spare battery now, even if tonight never needs it.

cards.name: 检修发电机
cards.body: 发电机听起来已经开始喘了。趁着白天还有点时间，把火花塞和滤芯顺手清一下。
cards.body_en: The generator is already starting to wheeze. I'll clean the plugs and the filter while the daylight's still on us.

cards.name: 校准电台
cards.body: 校一下电台，今晚的声音断断续续太久了。哪怕只多稳住半句也是好的。
cards.body_en: The radio keeps dropping mid-sentence. I'll recalibrate it tonight, even half a sentence longer counts out here.

cards.name: 整理工具台
cards.body: 工具乱成一团，谁找都慢半拍。我把它们顺手归位，修起来能快不少。
cards.body_en: Tools everywhere, everyone's fumbling. I'll sort the bench out now; everything's a bit faster after that.

cards.name: 固定天线
cards.body: 天线动不动就掉线，让人心里没底。再绑两圈，今晚的通话别断在要紧的地方。
cards.body_en: The antenna keeps losing signal at the worst moments. I'll lash it down a couple more turns; tonight's calls can't drop where it matters.

cards.name: 整理储物间
cards.body: 储物间翻一翻，总能多找出几块板子。应急时能多撑一会儿。
cards.body_en: I dig through storage and pull out a few spare planks. An extra patch when we really need one is worth the mess.

cards.name: 设医务角
cards.body: 用掉一点药品，但难民那边稳一稳。值得。
cards.body_en: It costs medicine, but it steadies the refugees a little. Worth it.

cards.name: 搜救看台
cards.body: 看台上还有人在躲着。我多走一趟，把人带回来。药品是消耗了，暴露度也得提。
cards.body_en: There are still people hiding in the bleachers. I'll make the run and bring them in. Costs medicine, and exposure climbs.

cards.name: 搜器材柜
cards.body: 再扫一遍器材室，能用的木板和零件都打包。今晚 Nora 会累一些，但她不会介意。
cards.body_en: I sweep the equipment room again, pack up every usable plank and part. Nora will be more tired tonight, but she won't mind.

cards.name: 公开路线
cards.body: 把坐标抛出去，外头也许有人能回应。代价是今晚我们更显眼一点。
cards.body_en: I'll broadcast the coordinates. Someone out there might answer. The cost is we stay visible a bit longer tonight.

cards.name: 保持沉默
cards.body: 今晚我不发任何信号。少一些动静，少一些被注意。外面听不到回应，我认。
cards.body_en: No signal from us tonight. Less noise, less attention. If no one answers from outside, that's the trade I take.

cards.name: 横闩后门
cards.body: 后门最近没什么动静，但不能当真。给它加一道杠，今晚我心里踏实一点。
cards.body_en: The back door has been quiet, but quiet isn't safe. One more bar there and I can stop listening for it every few minutes.

cards.name: 围住发电机
cards.body: 把发电机围起来。后门一旦告急，它的压力也别跟着崩。
cards.body_en: I cage the generator. When the back door starts giving way, at least the power won't go with it.

cards.name: 清出通道
cards.body: 我和队员之间那些绕路的杂物，今晚先清掉。下一次跑过去能省一两秒。
cards.body_en: I clear the junk between me and the crew. A second or two saved each run, over a whole night, adds up.

cards.name: 接医务灯
cards.body: 医务角太暗了。今晚把灯挂稳一点，那边的告警会少一些。
cards.body_en: Medbay's been too dim. I hang the lamp steady tonight; fewer alerts coming from that corner.

cards.name: 整理药箱
cards.body: 把药箱里的东西按用途排好。Nora 找东西不浪费时间了，她和窗户都能快一点。
cards.body_en: I sort the kit by use. Nora doesn't waste time hunting for things, and the windows move faster with her.

cards.name: 安排静默
cards.body: 前半夜我让队员压低动静。外面听不见我们，暴露度自然会慢慢降下来。
cards.body_en: First half of the night, I keep the crew quiet. Less for the outside to hear, and exposure drifts down on its own.

cards.name: 拆看台木板
cards.body: 看台拆下来那些板子，今晚能让我撑过去。但信任会花一点，暴露度也会涨。
cards.body_en: The bleachers have planks I can use tonight. It costs trust and exposure goes up, but we won't run out of boards.

cards.name: 双层窗撑
cards.body: 窗板再加一层。临阵封堵的时候能多顶几下，不至于一撞就裂。
cards.body_en: I double up the window boards. When an emergency patch has to hold, it won't crack on the first hit.

cards.name: 标记物资箱
cards.body: Victor 给过的那个坐标，今晚派人过去翻一翻。零件拿回来，储物这边能松口气。
cards.body_en: I send someone over to Victor's coordinates tonight. Whatever parts they bring back take some weight off storage.

cards.name: 信号电瓶
cards.body: 再接一块电瓶给天线备用。万一断电，电台信号不会马上垮掉。
cards.body_en: I tie a second battery to the antenna. If the power drops, the signal won't fall with it.

cards.name: 重走线缆
cards.body: 天线和电台之间的线缆太绕了。换一根直的，修复能快很多。
cards.body_en: The cables between antenna and radio are a mess. I reroute them straight; repairs go much faster.

cards.name: 给 Elias 工具
cards.body: 把工具递给 Elias。他一个人就能把电台和天线接得很快。
cards.body_en: I hand Elias the kit. He'll handle radio and antenna on his own, and a lot faster.

cards.name: 最后路障
cards.body: 今夜要把所有门窗再加固一次。两块木板都不心疼，能撑过今晚就行。
cards.body_en: I brace every door and window one more time tonight. Two planks is nothing if it gets us through.

cards.name: 全员分工
cards.body: Nora 和 Elias 我让他们今晚别轮休。累了再说，先守住今晚。
cards.body_en: Nora and Elias stay on tonight; no rotations. Tired is tomorrow's problem; tonight we hold.

cards.name: 开信标
cards.body: 最后一夜我把信标打开。窗口会长一些，但外面所有眼睛也会盯过来。
cards.body_en: Final night, I open the beacon. The window gets longer, but every eye out there will look this way.

cards.name: 让 Daniel 走
cards.body: 他的肩伤拖了大家一整夜。明天我让他往南边走，那边据说还有没塌的诊所。少一个人，门口我也得自己顶。
cards.body_en: His shoulder has been slowing us down for a night. Tomorrow I send him south toward a clinic that might still be standing. One less pair of hands at the door, and I cover it myself.

cards.name: 让 Daniel 留下
cards.body: 南边那条路我看不见底。他这条命我得担下来，哪怕他肩伤让他上不了场。明天再想办法，今夜我还是不让他一个人走出去。
cards.body_en: I can't see the end of that south road. I'll carry him on our books even with a busted shoulder. I'll find another way tomorrow; tonight I won't let him walk out alone.
